case=one_step_gmm_synthetic
command=one_step_gmm
depvar=y
covars=x1 x2
options=generated(x1) k(2) nguess(1) maxiter(500) seed(0)
tol_coef=0.001
tol_vcov=0.01
n=2000
k=3
vmli_version=1.4.0
note=One-step Gaussian-mixture MLE with k=2 components, heteroskedastic across the latent treatment. Bimodal centered residuals in each class. nguess=1 to fix the deterministic i=0 path for parity (multistart RNG differs between JAX and Mata).
